eidl_deposit.description: EIDL Advance deposited (1 day after PPP1)

transfer_to_9710.description: Full PPP1 balance transferred from deposit account to disbursement account. #9710 balance was $0.00 before transfer, had overdrafted $0.80 on 5/5/2020.

transfer_to_lg_chase.description: Lucas Guariglia transferred $70K to personal Chase Savings account 5657. 36 days after PPP1 deposit. Characterized as 'loan repayment' in mortgage correspondence. Used for 1768 Dunkirk Drive down payment.
transfer_to_lg_chase.mortgage_lender_quote: There is a large deposit of $70,000 into your Chase savings account on 5/26. We will need to document where these funds came from.
transfer_to_lg_chase.lucas_response: The $70 was transferred out of my business, Rowboat Creative, as loan repayment. I have attached screenshots of the ACH transfers out of the business, as well screen shots of the multiple transfers OUT of my personal account into the business totaling $70k.
transfer_to_lg_chase.statement_gap: The $70K transfer does NOT appear on account #9710 statements. #4700 statements are absent from evidence collection. The transfer likely occurred from Fifth Third account #4700.

cash_disb_67522.to: Theater Workers Relief Fund, Account #291003189070, Bank of America
cash_disb_67522.description: ACH payment to Theater Workers Relief Fund. Processed same day as $70K transfer to LG Chase. ACH company: ROWBOATCREA4700.

reversal.reason: Returned due to account routing info issue

dunkirk_down_payment.source_of_funds: $70K transfer from Fifth Third #4700 to LG Chase Savings #5657 on 5/26/2020

fifth_third_2845.notes: Appears only in 5/6/2020 transfer memo. Statements absent from evidence.

fifth_third_9710.role: PPP1 disbursement account (statements provided May 2020 - Jan 2021)
fifth_third_9710.notes: Overdrafted $0.80 on 5/5/2020. $70K transfer to LG Chase Savings does NOT appear on this account.

fifth_third_4700.role: Secondary business operating account. Likely source of $70K transfer and $67,522 ACH.
fifth_third_4700.notes: ACH company tag: ROWBOATCREA4700. Statements absent from evidence collection. Referenced in PPP USAGE spreadsheet for rent, healthcare, workers comp, loan payments, contractors.

lg_chase_savings_5657.role: Personal account receiving $70K transfer on 5/26/2020. Also received EIDL-related transfers.
lg_chase_savings_5657.notes: Referenced in JL Closing Emails for $40K transfer on 1/6, RBC CC rewards redemption, and $70K PPP-sourced deposit.

evidence_316897.title: Re: SBA Forgiveness / PPP Loan Documentation
evidence_316897.summary: Lucas confirms: round 1 for $195,805 on 4/20/2020 - both PPP loans fully forgiven. round 2 for $108,145 on 3/12/2021. Documentation available.
evidence_316897.excerpt: round 1 for $195,805 on 4/20/2020 YES. DOCUMENTATION HERE. round 2 for $108,145 on 3/12/2021 YES. DOCUMENTATION HERE

evidence_299795.title: Re: Tax Documents / PPP Forgiveness
evidence_299795.summary: Joe forwarded PPP forgiveness documentation. Attachments: 146073_sba_forgiveness_payment_notice.pdf, Paycheck_Protection_Program_documents_for_ROW-2.pdf
